finding_results.notes: Vel now distinguishes between fifty-eight years under the Ledger and forty-one years of active spending.
Kem's carry difficulty is framed as pain, deadweight, and Vel's depletion rather than literal weight gain.

finding_results.notes: The fight beats now stay inside action pressure: each spend is legible by objective and effect, but the separate training and ability-theory paragraphs were cut.
Sable's scree descent is kept live before the climax, and the text states why the commander cannot spare an agent to intercept her.
The chapter was restructured into short declarative action lines. Post-revision grep check found 0 em-dash lines in the chapter.
Repeated fallback phrasing was removed during the rewrite. Post-revision grep check found 0 instances of 'something' and 0 instances of 'the way'.

The chapter no longer rewinds to the basin opening. It now starts from an explicitly marked later beat in the same confrontation, with the light, distance, and tactical state advanced rather than reset.
Sable's arrival now tracks physically: the chapter establishes nearly three hours of elapsed time, keeps her scree-route descent visible, and pays it off at the threshold.

summary: Rebuilt Chapter 18 as the final two-hundred-meter push after an explicit later beat, corrected the Vel/Kem continuity errors and spend arithmetic, compressed explanatory fight commentary into action, seeded Sable's scree descent before her seven-level stabilization, and cleared the chapter-level em-dash and repeated-phrase thresholds.
